productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Sweat Shirts
description: CompositionBlue sweatshirt made of 100% cotton knit, has a boat neck with a drawstrings at the front, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, trims at the arm seams and along the drawstrings, two pockets on the waist and a broad hemFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degreesDo not bleach, scrub, wring or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm ironClassic and cosy, this blue sweatshirt from united colors of benetton is a great addition to your winter wardrobe.
